hero.title: Better retros,
hero.subtitle: A private, real-time retrospective board for Scrum and Kanban teams. Reflect honestly, vote together, and ship action items that stick.
hero.freeNotice: Free to use · No credit card required · Works with any team

features.title: Everything your team needs for a great retrospective.
features.subtitle: Built for teams who care about continuous improvement — not just ticking a ceremony box.
features.privateRoomsDesc: Password-protected spaces where your team can speak freely. No uninvited observers, ever.
features.realtimeDesc: Cards, votes, and status updates appear instantly for every participant — no refreshing required.
features.anonymousDesc: Let your team share honest feedback without their names attached. Psychological safety, built in.
features.actionItemsDesc: Capture outcomes directly on the board and track them to completion — no external tool needed.

steps.title: Up and running in minutes.
steps.subtitle: No onboarding calls. No complex setup. Just open a room and start reflecting.
steps.step1Desc: Name your retro, choose your columns, and protect it with a password. Ready in under a minute.
steps.step2Desc: Share the room link and password with your teammates. Anyone with the link can join.
steps.step3Desc: Add cards, vote on what matters most, discuss as a team, and close with clear action items.

cta.title: Your team deserves
cta.subtitle: Free forever. No credit card required. Your first retrospective takes less than a minute to set up.
cta.notice: Works with any Scrum or Kanban team · Sign in with Google

login.headline: Reflect Together.
login.subtitle: Structured retrospectives for high-performing teams. Real-time, collaborative, and genuinely useful.
login.signInTo: Sign in to continue to RetroDash
login.noAccount: No account yet? It’s created automatically on your first sign-in.

dashboard.emptySubtitle: Create your first retrospective room and invite your team to reflect and improve together.

newRoom.title: Create a Room
newRoom.subtitle: Set up a space for your team’s retrospective.
newRoom.passwordHint: Participants will need this to join.
newRoom.columnsHint: Define the topics your team will discuss.
newRoom.serverError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
newRoom.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 4 characters.
newRoom.columnsRequired: All column names must be filled in.
newRoom.createdShare: Share the password and room code with your team.

room.endRetroSubtitle: Add a closing phrase for this sprint — a goal, quote, or reflection. Optional.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.subtitle: This page doesn’t exist or was moved. Let’s get you back to your retrospectives.

joinRoom.passwordProtected: This room is password-protected. Enter the password to join.

joinRoomModal.subtitle: Paste the room code shared by your facilitator.

shareRoomModal.subtitleEnd: They will need the room password to join.

carryOver.hint: Import uncompleted items from a past retro
carryOver.noEndedRooms: No ended rooms yet. Rooms appear here after a retro ends.
